Join The Attachment Code
The Attachment Code
Earned Secure Attachment Journal
Tending What You Have Built

You did the work most people never attempt. This is not a journal for fixing what is broken — it is a space for tending what you have built. Come in. You have earned this.

What this journal is

A private space to tend the security you have earned — not to fix what is broken, but to deepen what is already working. Every entry lives only on your device.

Speak or write

Every response field has a microphone button. Tap it to speak your answer — your words transcribe in real time. Speaking often reveals more than writing. Both are valid.

Private by design

Your entries are saved locally on this device only. No server. No database. No one but you can access what you write here.

Your Secure Base Check-In
7
3
7
7
7
7
Move the sliders to check in with where you are today.
Choose Your Portal
The Distance Travelled
Growth · Recognition
The solid ground you have quietly built. Evidence of change. Pausing to acknowledge what is genuinely, structurally different.
The Remaining Edges
Triggers · Ongoing Work
Old pathways still fire. The gap between trigger and response. Where the work is still alive and asking for your attention.
The Way You Love Now
Relationships · Choosing
How connection looks different now. Choosing differently. What healthy feels like when it is still learning to feel familiar.
The Relationship With Yourself
Body · Regulation
Security as a somatic reality. What regulation feels like. Mapping the physical sensations of safety so your body knows it is allowed to rest.
The Integration
Wholeness · Narrative
Bringing the whole story together. Holding both the wound and the growth. The narrative of becoming — neither broken nor perfectly cured.
The Setback
Continuing · Practice
Security is not a destination. Complacency is its own trap. What it means to keep choosing this — especially when an old wave arrives.

Daily Practice

Seven steps. Work through them in order, or drop into wherever feels most true today.

1
Arrival
Check in with your body before your mind. Where are you landing today — grounded, activated, somewhere in between? Notice without judging.
GroundedOpenSteadyActivatedTenderTiredPresentUnsettledFull
2
The Activation
Did anything activate an old pattern today — even slightly? A tone, a silence, a dynamic that felt familiar in an unwelcome way? Describe it without verdict.
3
The Gap
What was the first impulse — and what did you actually do? How wide was the gap between the old reaction and your chosen response today?
4
The Evidence
One specific, unglamorous piece of evidence from today that you are operating from security rather than survival. However small. It counts.
5
The Body
Where did you feel regulated today? What did safety feel like in your body — and where did you feel the edges of it?
6
The Tending
What does your foundation need today? Not a grand gesture — one small act of tending your own security. Rest, honesty, a boundary, a connection.
7
The Closing
One honest sentence about where you are today — not where you think you should be. Where you actually are.

Private by design. Your entries are saved locally on this device only. No one else can access them.

Guided Prompts

Tell the guide what you're working through. She'll create personalised prompts, practices, or exercises written specifically for where you are right now — in this relationship, in this pattern, in this moment.

Recognising how far I've actually come
Working through a trigger that caught me off guard
Sitting with the discomfort of a healthy relationship
Understanding a setback without catastrophising it
Connecting more deeply with my own body and safety
Holding my history with compassion rather than shame
Staying committed to the work when it feels less urgent
Understanding what I'm building toward

Weekly Integration Checkpoint
Daily Practice

Actions Taken
0
this week

The Distance Travelled

What specific evidence this week showed you that you are genuinely different from who you were? Not feelings — observable facts.

The Remaining Edge

Where did the old pattern show up this week — even briefly? How did you handle it, and what does it tell you about what still needs tending?

The Moment of Choosing

One moment this week where you chose security over the familiar pull of the old pattern. What did that cost, and what did it give you?

This Week's Actions
Complete your daily 7-step practice
Write down three pieces of unglamorous evidence of your growth
Let one good thing land completely without questioning it
Name one trigger before acting on it
Do one somatic body check-in with no agenda
Ask yourself honestly: where did I get complacent this week?
Closing Ritual

What happened to your wiring was a map of your past. The story you are writing today is something else entirely. You are not who you were. You are also not finished. Both of those things are true — and both of them are cause for something that looks quietly like pride.

Private by design. Your entries are saved locally on this device only. No one else can access them.
